2605.23597.title: Structure-Guided Entity Resolution: Fine-Tuning LLMs for Robust Name Matching in Complex Linguistic Contexts
2605.23597.paper_summary: Matching person names across heterogeneous records is a core challenge in entity resolution, especially within linguistically and culturally complex environments. Variations in naming conventions, inconsistent transliteration across scripts, and frequent data entry errors make it difficult to unify user identities, an essential requirement for Know Your Customer (KYC) compliance. While Large Language Models have shown promise in understanding natural language, they often struggle with the structured ambiguity present in such domain-specific settings. This paper introduces Structure-Guided Entity Resolution (SGER), a novel framework that fine-tunes an LLM through a two-phase curriculum. The model is first trained to parse the grammatical and semantic structure of personal names, then optimized for the downstream task of binary entity matching. We evaluate SGER in the challenging context of Indian identity data, one of the most linguistically diverse and noisy environments globally. SGER achieves 99.02% accuracy and an F1 of 0.994 on a held-out set of 50,000 real-world pairs, outperforming GPT-4o few-shot prompting and single-stage fine-tuning baselines. The system is fully deployed in production at Dream11, the world's largest fantasy sports platform, serving 250M+ users. Our results demonstrate that curriculum-guided training enables robust, high-precision entity resolution in real-world multilingual systems at scale.
2605.23597.paper_summary_zh: 在異質記錄中匹配人名是實體解析中的核心挑戰，尤其是在語言和文化複雜的環境中。命名慣例的變化、跨腳本的不一致音譯以及頻繁的數據輸入錯誤使得統一用戶身份變得困難，而這對於遵循了解您的客戶（KYC）合規性是至關重要的。儘管大型語言模型在理解自然語言方面顯示出潛力，但它們在這類特定領域環境中經常面臨結構性模糊性問題。本文介紹了結構引導實體解析（SGER），這是一個通過兩階段課程微調大型語言模型的新框架。該模型首先訓練以解析人名的語法和語義結構，然後針對二元實體匹配的下游任務進行優化。我們在印度身份數據這一具有挑戰性的背景下評估SGER，這是全球最具語言多樣性和噪音的環境之一。SGER在一組50,000對真實世界樣本的保留集上達到了99.02%的準確率和0.994的F1分數，超越了GPT-4o的少量提示和單階段微調基準。該系統已在Dream11全面投入生產，這是全球最大的幻想體育平台，服務超過2.5億用戶。我們的結果表明，課程引導的訓練能夠在大規模的現實多語言系統中實現穩健、高精度的實體解析。
2605.23597.author: Shivam Chourasia et.al.
2605.23597.authors: Shivam Chourasia, Hitesh Kapoor, Nilesh Patil
